channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kylie Kelce says she sees husband Jason 'less now in retirement' than during his playing days
item.description: Jason Kelce's playing days may be over after 13 seasons, but his wife, Kylie, says the future Hall of Famer is busier now than when he played football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's golf tour owner reveals harrowing experience with trans golfer that sparked push for new LPGA ban
item.description: NXXT Golf Tour owner Stuart McKinnon recounted his experience dealing with trans golfer Hailey Davidson and the decision to ban the golfer in March.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lionel Messi wins MLS MVP award, the latest trophy on a long list of honors for the Inter Miami star
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — It was a rare instance of Lionel Messi stepping on a soccer field and having no idea what was happening. There they were, more than 250 Inter Miami academy players, a slew of kids lined up at midfield in a formation that spelled out three letters: MVP.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dan Campbell cheers on Detroit Lions player puking during postgame speech
item.description: Dan Campbell cheered on a Detroit Lions player who was puking during his postgame speech after the win over the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Lions clinch playoff spot with walk-off field goal in epic high-scoring affair against Packers
item.description: The Lions are back in the playoffs and have won 11 games in a row, this one being in walk-off fashion in a high-scoring affair against the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2024 CIF Regional Championships: Bakersfield Christian, Frontier play for Southern California title
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- Two Kern County schools remain in the high school football season, ready to play in CIF Regional Football Championship Bowl Games.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes sweep College of Charleston in NCAA Tournament
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's incredible turnaround season isn't done yet. After going 11-19 in 2023, the Utes Volleyball team has advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after a three-set sweep over the College of Charleston Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luis Severino and Athletics agree to $67 million, 3-year contract, AP sources say
item.description: Right-hander Luis Severino and the Athletics have agreed to a $67 million, three-year contract, two people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The people spoke on condition of anonymity Thursday because the agreement had not yet been announced by the team.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blackhawks fire coach Luke Richardson in his 3rd season after league-worst start
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks fired coach Luke Richardson on Thursday, signaling their frustration with the state of the franchise's rebuilding project. Chicago has dropped four in a row to fall to an NHL-worst 8-16-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The A's clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Las Vegas Stadium Authority approved lease, non-relocation and development documents Thursday to clear the last major hurdles for the Athletics to construct a $1.75 billion stadium on the Strip and bring Major League Baseball to the expanding sports market.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Scottie Scheffler has new putting grip and trails Cameron Young by 3 in Bahamas
item.description: NASSAU, Bahamas (AP) — Scottie Scheffler brought a new putting grip to the Hero World Challenge and felt enough improvement to be satisfied with the result, a 5-under 67 that left him three shots behind Cameron Young on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former ESPN star Adrian Wojnarowski eyed by Harris campaign to announce Tim Walz VP pick: report
item.description: The Harris campaign reportedly wanted former ESPN star Adrian Wojnarowski to break the news that Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz would be added to the Democratic ticket alongside Harris.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Urban Meyer shuts down Ohio State return rumors, fully backs head coach Ryan Day
item.description: Urban Meyer will "always be a Buckeye," but the former head coach said Thursday he has no plans to return with Ryan Day facing scrutiny after another loss to Michigan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amber Glenn takes the lead in Grand Prix Final figure skating after Kaori Sakamoto falls
item.description: GRENOBLE, France (AP) — Competing with five Japanese skaters in the six-woman field, Amber Glenn of the United States continued her breakout season in figure skating by taking the lead in the short program at the Grand Prix Final on Thursday as world champion Kaori Sakamoto fell.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: The draw for FIFA’s revamped Club World Cup is coming up. Here’s what to know
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Soccer’s biggest ever global club tournament is coming to the United States next year and the 32-team group stage will be drawn Thursday.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Robbie Gould resigns as head football coach at Rolling Meadows High School
item.description: District 214 officials have announced the resignation of former Chicago Bears kicker and Rolling Meadows Mustangs head football coach, Gould, after a 5-5 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: Texas safety Michael Taaffe honors Jake Ehlinger, 'feels sorry' for fan who made sign mocking death
item.description: Taaffe had strong, passionate comments regarding a sign held up by a fan in the crowd for ESPN's College Gameday, broadcasting from the Texas A&M campus the morning before the big game.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: McLaughlin's field goal in OT helps Bucs beat Panthers 26-23, move into 1st-place tie in NFC South
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the Carolina Panthers 26-23 in overtime on a 30-yard field goal by Chase McLaughlin on Sunday to move into a tie for first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Monahan with goal and assist, Blue Jackets extend points streak to 6 with 6-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Sean Monahan had a goal and assist, and the Columbus Blue Jackets extended their points streak to six games with a 6-3 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Edmonton, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ryan Nugent-Hopkins scored at 1:18 of overtime to give the Edmonton Oilers a 4-3 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Friday. Nugent-Hopkins skated in on a breakaway and beat Karel Vejmelka blocker side from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
